content.json:
## Incident operations overview
---
Incident volume, severity mix, and closure performance for this workspace, over the selected time range.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize Incidents = count() by Severity, bin(CreatedTime, 1d)
| order by CreatedTime asc
content.title: Incidents created over time, by severity

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status != 'Closed'
| summarize Open = count() by Severity
content.title: Open incidents by severity

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status == 'Closed'
| extend HoursToClose = datetime_diff('minute', ClosedTime, CreatedTime) / 60.0
| summarize MeanHoursToClose = round(avg(HoursToClose), 1) by Severity
content.title: Mean hours to close, by severity

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| project CreatedTime, IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, Status, Owner = tostring(Owner.userPrincipalName)
| order by CreatedTime desc
| take 50
content.title: Most recent incidents
